summary.business_type: E-commerce — custom hand-drawn cartoon portraits (digital + print-on-demand), EN/US market, Next.js/Vercel + Supabase + Stripe/PayPal
top_findings: Product schema 'image' malformed (domain concatenated onto absolute Supabase URLs) on 4 key style pages: simpsons, rick-and-morty, gravity-falls, fairly-oddparents — breaks Product rich-result eligibility
No aggregateRating/Review schema anywhere despite 16+ five-star testimonials displayed — missing SERP stars
Weak blog E-E-A-T: generic author Person 'Negasva' (no real name/credentials), zero external citations in posts
Entry price inconsistent across surfaces: 'from $15' (titles/meta/schema/llms.txt) vs 'from $20' (home sticky bar) vs '$25' (home pricing card)
Duplicate placeholder images reused across different styles on /styles (rm-3/4/6/10.webp)
quick_wins: Fix domain-prefix concatenation in Product.image template (~1 line)
Translate leftover Spanish '✓ Compra verificada' → 'Verified purchase'; unify entry price
Add H1 to /track-order; improve /contact title (17 chars)
Add image to the 3 /products Product schemas
Update home footer links /privacidad, /terminos to final EN URLs (avoid 301 hops)
resolved_since_last_audit: Canonicals now self-referencing on all 53 pages
Site fully migrated ES→EN with clean 301s

categories.name: Technical SEO
what_works: Strong security headers (CSP, HSTS, nosniff, XFO DENY, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy)

findings.title: Home footer links pass through 301 redirects
findings.description: Footer on / still links /privacidad and /terminos which 301 to /privacy and /terms.
findings.recommendation: Update footer hrefs to final URLs.

findings.title: Uniform sitemap lastmod
findings.description: 40 URLs share lastmod 2026-07-05 (build-generated), reducing signal value.

categories.name: Content Quality
what_works: Style pages 2,700-3,000 words; gift pages ~1,750; blog posts 1,700-2,500
Mature architecture: 13 style + 12 occasion landings + 13-post blog cluster
Comparative posts naming competitors (Turned Yellow, Etsy, Fiverr) — highly LLM-citable
Consistent 'hand-drawn, no AI' differentiator with dedicated landing

findings.title: Weak author E-E-A-T
findings.description: BlogPosting author is Person 'Negasva' with no real name/credentials; zero outbound citations in posts.
findings.recommendation: Create real author page (name, photo, bio, Behance) and cite external sources.

findings.title: Testimonials not verifiable
findings.description: Reviews show Spanish label 'Compra verificada' on an English site, generic multi-country names, no verifiable source.
findings.recommendation: Link reviews to a verifiable system or replace with real verifiable reviews.

findings.title: Inconsistent entry price
findings.description: $15 vs $20 vs $25 shown as starting price depending on surface.

findings.title: Sparse in-body internal linking
findings.description: Sampled post had only 4 internal links, mostly CTAs.
findings.recommendation: Add 4-8 contextual internal links per post.

categories.name: On-Page SEO
what_works: Single H1 on 52/53 pages, clean H2 hierarchy, breadcrumbs
Unique titles and meta descriptions on all 53 pages

findings.title: /track-order missing H1
findings.description: Only page with 0 H1.

findings.title: Titles exceed 70 chars
findings.description: /order 73, /cartoon-yourself 74, /products 73, gift pages 69-85, /custom-pet-portrait 85 — truncated in SERP.

findings.title: /contact title underused (17 chars)
findings.description: Title and meta far below optimal length.

findings.title: Obsolete meta keywords tag
findings.description: Present on several templates.

categories.name: Schema / Structured Data
what_works: Broad coverage: OnlineStore, Product+AggregateOffer (26 pages), FAQPage, HowTo, BreadcrumbList, BlogPosting (complete), ImageGallery, ProfilePage
Previous audit's duplicate/competing Product nodes resolved

findings.title: Malformed Product.image on 4 style pages
findings.description: image = 'https://negasva.shophttps://rohzujxjomqxrhvpoxvg.supabase.co/...' — site URL concatenated onto already-absolute Supabase URLs. Affects simpsons, rick-and-morty, gravity-falls, fairly-oddparents; other 9 style pages (relative images) OK. Verified live 2026-07-10.
findings.recommendation: Guard: image.startsWith('http') ? image : SITE_URL + image. Re-validate in Rich Results Test.

findings.title: No aggregateRating/Review on any Product
findings.description: Site displays 16+ 5-star testimonials but no review markup.
findings.recommendation: Add only with real, verifiable reviews.

findings.title: /products Product schemas missing image
findings.description: All 3 print-product schemas lack image.

findings.title: Duplicate FAQPage blocks on /faq
findings.description: Two FAQPage nodes on one page.

findings.title: No field data (CrUX/PSI unavailable — anonymous API quota exhausted)
findings.description: Lab-only measurement.
findings.recommendation: Run PSI manually for mobile field LCP; hero images come from Supabase at w=3840 — review sizes attr.

categories.name: AI Search Readiness
what_works: FAQs in DOM, concrete facts/prices, competitor comparisons

findings.title: Zero external citations
findings.description: No outbound authority links in content.

findings.title: llms.txt price contradicts UI
findings.description: 'from $15' vs $20/$25 in UI.

findings.title: llms.txt contact incomplete
findings.description: Only Instagram listed.

findings.title: Placeholder images duplicated across styles
findings.description: rm-4.webp used for Disney-Pixar AND Futurama; rm-6 for Family Guy AND Bob's Burgers; rm-3, rm-10 also reused on /styles.

findings.title: Missing OG image on legal pages; twitter meta inherits home values on internal pages
findings.description: Partial metadata overrides.

phases.name: Phase 1: Critical Fixes
items: Fix Product.image domain concatenation (4 style pages)

phases.name: Phase 2: High-Impact Improvements
items: aggregateRating/Review schema with real reviews only

phases.name: Phase 3: Content & Authority
items: 2-4 external citations + 4-8 contextual internal links per post

phases.name: Phase 4: Monitoring & Iteration
items: GSC: verify indexation + rich results after fixes
